text.title: Kubernetes Load Balancing: Services, Ingress, Probes Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on Service scope + external LB role.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: choose-ingress
step.action: Pick controller (Nginx default, ALB Controller for AWS-native).

step.name: wire-probes-and-drain
step.action: Add liveness, readiness, preStop, grace period.

step.name: provision-tls-validate
step.action: Install cert-manager; ClusterIssuer; Ingress TLS spec; validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
